enonce.texte: Match the shopping vocabulary with their correct definitions.

questions.texte: Match the words with their meanings:

sousQuestions.reponse: D. a person who sells things
A. a person who buys things
B. the amount of money you pay
C. a person who buys goods or services

enonce.texte:
Complete the dialogue between a seller and a buyer with the correct words from the box.

Box: How much, I would like, please, thank you, cost, price

questions.texte:
Complete the dialogue:

Seller: Good morning! Can I help you?
Buyer: Good morning! ______ a kilo of oranges.
Seller: Certainly. Here you are.
Buyer: ______ does it ______?
Seller: The ______ is 500 CFA.
Buyer: Here is 500 CFA.
Seller: Thank you!
Buyer: ______ you!
questions.reponse:
1. I would like
2. How much
3. cost
4. price
5. Thank

enonce.texte: Write the correct questions that a customer would ask in these shopping situations. Use the shopping vocabulary you have learned.

questions.texte: You want to know the price of a dress. What do you ask?
questions.reponse: How much is this dress? OR What is the price of this dress?

questions.texte: You want to buy two kilos of rice. What do you say?
questions.reponse: I would like two kilos of rice, please.

questions.texte: You want to know if the seller has shoes. What do you ask?
questions.reponse: Do you have shoes? OR Do you sell shoes?

questions.texte: You want to thank the seller after buying something. What do you say?

enonce.texte:
Read the advertisement and answer the questions.

⭐ SUPER MARKET SALE ⭐

SPECIAL OFFERS:

  • Rice: 500 CFA per kilo (normal price: 600 CFA)
  • Sugar: 400 CFA per packet (normal price: 450 CFA)
  • Oranges: 300 CFA per kilo
  • Milk: 600 CFA per bottle
  • Bread: 350 CFA per loaf

Hurry! Limited stock!

questions.texte: What is the special price of rice?
How much does a bottle of milk cost?
What is the normal price of sugar?
How much would you pay for 2 kilos of oranges?

enonce.texte:
Write a short dialogue between a seller and a buyer. Use at least 5 words from the shopping vocabulary list.

Vocabulary to use: seller, buyer, price, cost, quality, customer, groceries, shoes, clothes, how much

questions.texte: Write a dialogue between a seller and a buyer at a market.
questions.reponse:
Example:
Seller: Good morning, customer! How can I help you?
Buyer: Good morning! I would like to buy some groceries. How much are these tomatoes?
Seller: They are 400 CFA per kilo. The quality is very good.
Buyer: I will take 2 kilos. And what is the price of these shoes?
Seller: These shoes cost 5000 CFA.
Buyer: That is a good price. I will take them.
Seller: That will be 5800 CFA total.
Buyer: Here you are. Thank you!
Seller: Thank you! Come again!

enonce.texte:
Listen to the advertisement (read by your teacher) and answer the questions.

Teacher's Script:

"Good morning, customers! Welcome to Mama's Market. This week we have special offers! Apples are 300 CFA per kilo. Bananas are 200 CFA per bunch. We have fresh fish at 1500 CFA per kilo. And don't forget our delicious bread at 400 CFA per loaf. Come and buy! We have the best quality and the best prices in town!"

questions.texte: What is the price of apples per kilo?
How much does a bunch of bananas cost?
What is the price of bread per loaf?
How much would you pay for 2 kilos of fish?

enonce.texte:
Write questions and answers based on the information in the advertisement below.

📢 SPECIAL OFFERS AT FRESH MARKET 📢

  • Rice: 500 CFA/kg
  • Sugar: 400 CFA/packet
  • Milk: 600 CFA/bottle
  • Bread: 350 CFA/loaf
  • Oranges: 300 CFA/kg
  • Fish: 2000 CFA/kg

questions.texte: Write a question asking for the price of sugar.
questions.reponse: How much is sugar? OR What is the price of sugar?

questions.texte: Write a question asking if they have fish.
Write a question asking for the cost of 3 loaves of bread.
questions.reponse: How much do 3 loaves of bread cost?

questions.texte: Write a question asking about the quality of the oranges.
questions.reponse: Is the quality of the oranges good?

enonce.texte:
You are a shop assistant. A customer wants to buy the following items. Fill out the receipt for the customer.

Customer's Order:

  • 2 kilos of rice
  • 1 packet of sugar
  • 3 bottles of milk
  • 2 loaves of bread
  • 1 kilo of oranges

Prices: Rice: 500 CFA/kg, Sugar: 400 CFA/packet, Milk: 600 CFA/bottle, Bread: 350 CFA/loaf, Oranges: 300 CFA/kg

RECEIPT

Item | Quantity | Price | Total

Rice | ___ | ___ | ___

Sugar | ___ | ___ | ___

Milk | ___ | ___ | ___

Bread | ___ | ___ | ___

Oranges | ___ | ___ | ___

Total: ______ CFA

questions.texte: Fill out the receipt with the correct quantities and totals.
questions.reponse:
Rice: 2 kg | 500 CFA/kg | 1000 CFA
Sugar: 1 packet | 400 CFA/packet | 400 CFA
Milk: 3 bottles | 600 CFA/bottle | 1800 CFA
Bread: 2 loaves | 350 CFA/loaf | 700 CFA
Oranges: 1 kg | 300 CFA/kg | 300 CFA
Total: 4200 CFA

sousQuestions.texte: Calculate the total cost of rice.
Calculate the total cost of milk.
Calculate the total cost of bread.
Calculate the total cost of everything.
